content_title: AI Governance Wiki + wiki.html (post URL-update re-check)

findings.content_text: Set to be the world's first comprehensive regional digital-economy treaty … negotiating 2023–2024 (conclusion targeted 2025)
findings.source_passage: will be the world's first comprehensive regional digital economy treaty among developing and emerging-market countries when concluded [CA7-BP2(a)]
findings.finding: Previous run's ASEAN DEFA tense warning is fully resolved. Wiki now correctly uses future tense and notes the 2025 target.

findings.source_passage: UNESCO, *Readiness Assessment Methodology (RAM) for AI*, 2021, with 2023 Facilitation Guide — https://www.unesco.org/en/artificial-intelligence/recommendation/ram [CA1-BP1(e)]
findings.finding: The wiki URL /recommendation-ethics leads to the UNESCO Recommendation on AI Ethics — a separate resource. The source specifies /recommendation/ram, the RAM-specific landing page. A user following the wiki link arrives at the wrong document.

findings.source_passage: ILO Working Paper No. 87 (2023), *Automation and the Future of Work in Developing Countries*: https://www.ilo.org/wcmsp5/groups/public/---dgreports/---inst/documents/publication/wcms_869256.pdf [CA6-BP1(e)]
findings.finding: The page is titled 'ILO Working Paper No. 87' but its primary source URL leads to the WESO 2024 flagship report — an entirely different ILO publication. The WESO 2024 was the secondary source for this entry; it should not replace the Working Paper citation.
findings.required_action: Restore the Working Paper No. 87 URL: https://www.ilo.org/wcmsp5/groups/public/---dgreports/---inst/documents/publication/wcms_869256.pdf — The WESO 2024 URL may be retained as a supplementary note.

findings.finding: The entity page header correctly says v23.06 but the URL was changed to v22.10, an earlier version. This creates an internal inconsistency (header vs URL) and contradicts the source, which specifies v23.06.

Two differences from the source URL: upload path changed from 2021/12 to 2022/08, and filename changed from '2021-FinAccess-Household-Survey-Report.pdf' to '2021-Finaccesss-Survey-Report.pdf' (note triple-s 'Finaccesss' — likely a typo). Cannot confirm this URL is live.
findings.required_action: Verify the updated URL resolves at CBK portal. If live, retain. If broken or triple-s is a transcription error, restore source URL: https://www.centralbank.go.ke/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/2021-FinAccess-Household-Survey-Report.pdf

findings.source_passage: FSD Africa, *AI and Financial Services in Africa* (2023): https://fsdafrica.org/research/ai-and-financial-services/ [CA6-BP3(e)]
findings.finding: Changed from the specific /research/ai-and-financial-services/ page to the general /publications/ index. The named 2023 report is no longer directly linked.
findings.required_action: Verify if /research/ai-and-financial-services/ is still live. If so, restore it. The source specifies this specific page.

findings.finding: Domain changed from aiverify.sg to aiverifyfoundation.sg. May be a valid updated URL or incorrect. Cannot confirm from source document alone.
findings.required_action: Human reviewer: confirm which domain is the current official AI Verify Foundation URL.

findings.source_passage: World Bank WPS10415 (2023), *Automation and Labor Markets in Developing Countries*: https://openknowledge.worldbank.org/handle/10986/39788 [CA6-BP2(e)]
findings.finding: Specific document handle (/handle/10986/39788) removed; now links only to the Open Knowledge repository homepage. The named working paper is no longer directly accessible from the link.
Specific PDF document URL replaced with G20 homepage. The named document is no longer directly linked.
findings.required_action: Verify if the specific PDF URL is still live; if so, restore it.

findings.finding: Specific AI Policy page path dropped; now links only to the MINICT homepage.
findings.required_action: Verify if /index.php/en/artificial-intelligence-policy is still live; if so, restore.

findings.finding: URL path structure changed significantly. Cannot confirm from source document alone whether this is a valid redirect or a different page.
findings.required_action: Human reviewer: verify both URLs resolve to the ASEAN DEFA page.

findings.section_label: asean-defa.md — Primary source URL (ASEAN AI Guide)
findings.source_passage: ASEAN Guide on AI Governance and Ethics (2nd ed., 2023): https://asean.org/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/ASEAN-Guide-on-AI-Governance-and-Ethics_2023.pdf [CA7-BP2(e)]
findings.finding: Changed from a direct PDF link to a web landing page. Cannot confirm from source alone whether the 2023 2nd edition content is accessible at the new URL.
findings.required_action: Human reviewer: verify the 2nd edition 2023 PDF is accessible from the new URL.
